_doc: Calibrated selectors for skills/square_tips/transactions_backend.py against the Square Dashboard Transactions report (app.squareup.com/dashboard/sales/transactions). Per-transaction CSV export. Mirrors dashboard.json structure.
verified_by: Cursor AI agent driving user-playwright MCP, fresh from-scratch flow

login._doc: Login selectors are identical to dashboard.json. Same Square login page.

date_range_pill.primary_text_pattern: button matching MM/DD/YYYY–MM/DD/YYYY in the filter bar
date_range_pill.notes: Click to open the date picker popover. The visible text is the current range. Currently positioned right after the 'Select previous date interval' button (which has aria-label='Select previous date interval').

date_picker.panel_dialog_indicator: Calendar popover containing 'Start' and 'End' labels + month nav buttons

start_date_input.primary_position: first text input inside the date-picker popover
start_date_input.notes: Direct text input. Format: MM/DD/YYYY. Calibrated 2026-05-16 with ember66 dynamic id (not stable). Type the value then press Enter to commit (or click outside the picker).

end_date_input.primary_position: second text input inside the date-picker popover
end_date_input.notes: Direct text input. Format: MM/DD/YYYY. Press Enter to apply range.

date_picker.notes: Square supports arbitrarily large ranges via direct date typing. Confirmed 55 days (Mar 22 → May 15) works in a single export request.

status_filter_complete.notes: Default filter is 'Complete' (excludes pending/failed). Leave as-is for production runs. Other values: 'All Types'.

export_trigger_button.notes: Top-right of the report header. Click to expand the Export panel (does NOT immediately download).

generate_button.notes: Click to start async generation. The row's status changes to '500/N Rows' progress, then to 'Generated a few seconds ago' when done.

download_button.notes: Appears in place of the Generate button once generation completes. Click triggers actual file download.

toast_when_ready.notes: A toast also appears at the bottom with a Download shortcut. Either button works.

summary_kpis.complete_transactions_count: page h4 sibling text shows '{N} Complete Transactions'
summary_kpis.total_collected: page h4 sibling text shows '${X} Total Collected'
summary_kpis.net_sales: page h4 sibling text shows '${X} Net Sales'
summary_kpis.notes: Use these to sanity-check the downloaded CSV — sum of Total Collected column must equal the on-page 'Total Collected' figure (exact match validated 2026-05-16: $47,946.77).

polling._doc: Async generation polling pattern for the orchestrator
polling.approach: After clicking generate_button, poll the export-panel row text every 5 seconds. Generation is complete when (a) Download button appears in place of Generate button, OR (b) row text contains 'Generated' instead of 'Ready in'.

estimated_duration_seconds.notes: Roughly 1 second per 50 transactions. A typical daily scrape (~50 tx) should complete in 1-2 seconds. Single-day scrapes may not even render the progress text.

polling.on_timeout: DM via skills/slack and exit non-zero — don't silently retry, could indicate Square-side outage.

csv_format.filename_end_date_note: Square names the file with end_date+1 (exclusive end). Range Mar 22 → May 15 produces filename ending in 2026-05-16. Don't infer date range from filename — use the data inside.
csv_format.money_format: Strings like '$13.50', '-$3.45', '$0.00'. Negatives are leading-minus, NOT parens (different from Sales Summary Days CSV which used parens).
csv_format.row_grain: ONE ROW PER TRANSACTION (Transaction ID is unique). Confirmed 2026-05-16: 2,956 rows = 2,956 unique transaction IDs.

timezone_quirk.issue: The Time Zone column shows the Square ACCOUNT's display timezone (currently 'Eastern Time (US & Canada)'), NOT the shop's local timezone. Austin shop is America/Chicago (CT). Late-night CT transactions roll into the next ET day.
timezone_quirk.fix: In parse_csv(), construct the timestamp as Eastern Time, then convert to America/Chicago via zoneinfo. Derive date_local, hour_local, dow_local from the converted timestamp. Date column from CSV is NOT trustworthy for shop-day bucketing.
timezone_quirk.example: Transaction at 23:30 CT on May 14 will appear in CSV as Date=2026-05-15, Time=00:30:00, Time Zone='Eastern Time (US & Canada)'. After conversion: 2026-05-14 23:30 America/Chicago.

tip_handling.negative_tips_on_refunds: Refund rows have negative Tip values (e.g. -$3.45). When summing daily tip pools, REFUND rows reduce the pool. This is correct — the tipped employee for the original payment effectively gives the tip back via the refund.
tip_handling.zero_tip_rate: About 57% of transactions have $0 tip (1,701/2,956 in calibration data). Sum of nonzero tips matches the on-page Tips total.

field_mapping_to_raw_sheet._doc: Recommended mapping from CSV columns to bhaga-square-raw.transactions_raw tab columns (per the bhaga-daily-refresh plan).
field_mapping_to_raw_sheet.event_type: CSV col 'Event Type' (index 31). Values: Payment | Refund
field_mapping_to_raw_sheet.created_at_et_iso: Combine 'Date' + 'Time' as 'YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss-04:00' or -05:00 (DST-aware). Preserve raw for audit.
field_mapping_to_raw_sheet.date_local: Date portion of created_at_local_iso. KEY for daily aggregation.
field_mapping_to_raw_sheet.hour_local: Hour (0-23) of created_at_local_iso. KEY for dow_hour heatmap.
field_mapping_to_raw_sheet.total_collected_cents: CSV col 'Total Collected' (index 11) → parse_money_cents() (before Square fees)
field_mapping_to_raw_sheet.source: CSV col 'Source' (index 12). Values: Register | Square Kiosk | Uber Eats | DoorDash | Grubhub | etc.
field_mapping_to_raw_sheet.staff_name: CSV col 'Staff Name' (index 27). Often empty (kiosk, third-party). When present, valuable for cross-check vs ADP shifts.
field_mapping_to_raw_sheet.location: CSV col 'Location' (index 32). Currently always 'Austin Mueller Lake'.
field_mapping_to_raw_sheet.scraped_at: Wall-clock UTC ISO timestamp when the orchestrator ran.

calibration_session_notes: 2026-05-16: Calibrated against Palmetto Superfoods Square account. Logged in with adi@mypalmetto.co (Keychain: jarvis-square-palmetto).
2026-05-16: Validated end-to-end with 55-day backfill (Mar 22 - May 15, 2026): 2,956 transactions, $47,946.77 Total Collected, $2,527.21 in tips, 6 refunds. CSV totals match on-page summary exactly.
2026-05-16: Account display TZ is ET but shop is in Austin (CT). All downstream date logic MUST convert to America/Chicago before bucketing by day.
